_meta.purpose: Master catalog of every contract/document template CyberSygn authors and owns.
_meta.bar: Each template authored to the gold standard in templates-content/master-services-agreement.md. Constitution 1.13 + 1.14.
_meta.framing: Every template ships as an excellent, customizable starting draft with attorney-review framing. Not legal advice.

templates.title: Master Services Agreement
templates.subtitle: Umbrella terms for ongoing vendor and consulting work.

templates.title: Statement of Work
templates.subtitle: Scope, deliverables, timeline, and fee for one engagement under an MSA.

templates.title: Consulting Agreement
templates.subtitle: Independent consulting engagement with scope and fee terms.

templates.title: Professional Services Agreement
templates.subtitle: General professional services with deliverables and payment.

templates.title: Retainer Agreement
templates.subtitle: Ongoing monthly retainer for recurring professional work.

templates.title: Independent Contractor Agreement
templates.subtitle: 1099 contractor scope, payment, and IP terms.

templates.title: Subcontractor Agreement
templates.subtitle: Prime-to-sub terms, flow-down obligations, and payment.

templates.title: Vendor Agreement
templates.subtitle: Supplier terms covering goods or services and payment.

templates.title: Supply Agreement
templates.subtitle: Recurring supply of goods with pricing and delivery terms.

templates.title: Reseller Agreement
templates.subtitle: Authorized reseller terms, margins, and branding.

templates.title: Referral Agreement
templates.subtitle: Referral fees, attribution, and payment timing.

templates.title: Affiliate Agreement
templates.subtitle: Affiliate commission terms and promotional rules.

templates.title: Joint Venture Agreement
templates.subtitle: Two parties combining resources for a defined venture.

templates.title: Partnership Agreement
templates.subtitle: General partnership formation, contributions, and profit split.

templates.title: Limited Partnership Agreement
templates.subtitle: LP structure with general and limited partner roles.

templates.title: Founders Agreement
templates.subtitle: Early-stage co-founder equity, roles, and vesting.

templates.title: Memorandum of Understanding
templates.subtitle: Non-binding statement of intent between parties.

templates.title: Letter of Intent
templates.subtitle: Preliminary deal terms before a definitive agreement.

templates.title: Term Sheet
templates.subtitle: Summary of key commercial terms for negotiation.

templates.title: Business Sale Agreement
templates.subtitle: Asset or share purchase of a small business.

templates.title: Share Purchase Agreement
templates.subtitle: Purchase of equity in a company.

templates.title: Stock Option Agreement
templates.subtitle: Grant of options under an equity plan.

templates.title: Buy-Sell Agreement
templates.subtitle: Owner exit, death, and transfer provisions.

templates.title: Sales Representative Agreement
templates.subtitle: Outside sales rep territory and commissions.

templates.title: Manufacturing Agreement
templates.subtitle: Contract manufacturing terms and quality standards.

templates.title: Outsourcing Agreement
templates.subtitle: Outsourced business process terms and SLAs.

templates.title: Procurement Agreement
templates.subtitle: Purchasing terms for goods and services.

templates.title: White Label Agreement
templates.subtitle: Rebranding a product under a partner brand.

templates.title: Agency Agreement
templates.subtitle: Authority of an agent to act for a principal.

templates.title: Escrow Agreement
templates.subtitle: Third-party holding of funds or documents.

templates.title: Visitor NDA
templates.subtitle: Short confidentiality for site or facility visitors.

templates.title: IP Assignment Agreement
templates.subtitle: Assignment of invention and work-product rights.

templates.title: Trademark License Agreement
templates.subtitle: License to use a mark with quality control.

templates.title: Patent License Agreement
templates.subtitle: License to practice a patented invention.

templates.title: End User License Agreement
templates.subtitle: EULA for app or software end users.

templates.title: Content License Agreement
templates.subtitle: License of articles, video, or media.

templates.title: Royalty Agreement
templates.subtitle: Ongoing royalty on sales or usage.

templates.title: Brand Licensing Agreement
templates.subtitle: License of brand assets to a partner.

templates.title: Data License Agreement
templates.subtitle: License of a dataset with use limits.

templates.title: API License Agreement
templates.subtitle: Terms for using a developer API.

templates.title: Music License Agreement
templates.subtitle: Sync or master use of a recording.

templates.title: Font License Agreement
templates.subtitle: License of typeface for commercial use.

templates.title: Employment Agreement
templates.subtitle: W-2 employment terms, pay, and IP.

templates.title: At-Will Employment Agreement
templates.subtitle: Confirms at-will status and basic terms.

templates.title: Internship Agreement
templates.subtitle: Paid or unpaid intern scope and terms.

templates.title: Non-Solicitation Agreement
templates.subtitle: Limits on soliciting clients or staff.

templates.title: Severance Agreement
templates.subtitle: Separation pay and release of claims.

templates.title: Employee Loan Agreement
templates.subtitle: Advance or loan to an employee.

templates.title: PTO Policy
templates.subtitle: Paid time off accrual and use.

templates.title: Room Rental Agreement
templates.subtitle: Single-room rental in a shared home.

templates.subtitle: Cost and chore split among roommates.

templates.subtitle: Extend a lease for a new term.

templates.title: Option to Purchase Agreement
templates.subtitle: Right to buy at a set price.

templates.title: Quitclaim Deed Cover Letter
templates.subtitle: Cover note for a quitclaim deed.

templates.subtitle: Consent to use a person's likeness.

templates.subtitle: License of photos for defined use.

templates.title: Print Release
templates.subtitle: Permission for client to print images.

templates.title: Podcast Guest Release

templates.subtitle: Transfer of ownership of an item.

templates.subtitle: Sale of a car, truck, or motorcycle.

templates.subtitle: Buyer order for goods or services.

templates.title: Equipment Loan Agreement
templates.subtitle: Loan of gear for an event.

templates.title: Terms of Service
templates.subtitle: Rules for using a website or app.

templates.subtitle: How user data is collected and used.

templates.title: Media Release
templates.subtitle: Consent to use media of a person.

templates.title: Travel Consent for Minor
templates.subtitle: Consent for a minor to travel.

templates.subtitle: Formal demand for payment or action.

templates.title: Notice of Termination
templates.subtitle: End a contract per its terms.

templates.subtitle: Notice that a party is in default.

templates.title: Collection Letter
templates.subtitle: Request to pay an overdue amount.

templates.title: Authorization Letter
templates.subtitle: Authorize someone to act for you.

templates.title: Notice of Assignment
templates.subtitle: Notice that a contract was assigned.

templates.title: Goodwill Letter
templates.subtitle: Request to remove a credit mark.

templates.title: Order Form
templates.subtitle: Product or service order under a master agreement.

templates.title: Quote Acceptance Agreement
templates.subtitle: Turn a quote into a binding order.

templates.subtitle: Replace a party to a contract.

templates.title: Right of First Refusal Agreement
templates.subtitle: First right to match an offer.

templates.subtitle: Supplemental terms to a main agreement.

templates.subtitle: Formal change to an existing contract.

templates.subtitle: Waive a right or consent to an action.

templates.subtitle: Loan of company gear to staff.

templates.title: Confidential Information Return
templates.subtitle: Confirm return of materials at exit.

templates.subtitle: Bonus for staying through a date.

templates.subtitle: Right to use part of a property.

templates.subtitle: License to enter for a purpose.

templates.subtitle: Note with a large final payment.

templates.subtitle: Rules for using AI tools internally.

templates.subtitle: Scope and fees for a professional engagement.

templates.subtitle: Transfer a file to another provider.

templates.title: Scope of Engagement
templates.subtitle: Define what is and is not included.
